title: Batch 1 — Idea to handoff boundary variant
baseline_summary: The baseline handoff path is still correct, but in this variant its forward-looking language can tempt readers to treat a bounded handoff as operational readiness rather than a proposal-safe artifact.
delta_summary_tail: captured why handoff language can be overread as runtime readiness.

comparison_axes.reason: Delta identifies the runtime-adjacent misreading sooner and more explicitly.
Delta keeps the no-runtime implication more visible than the plain baseline read.
Delta resists treating handoff polish as evidence of downstream readiness.
The main issue is interpretive drift more than absent evidence.
Both tracks still support a bounded handoff result once the frame is narrowed.
